31701.title: Moral Boundaries
31701.abstract: This article reviews the growing economics literature that studies the politico-economic impacts of heterogeneity in moral boundaries across individuals and cultures. The so-called universalism-versus-particularism cleavage has emerged as a main organizing principle behind various salient features of contemporary political competition, including individual-level and spatial variation in voting, the realignment of rich liberals and poor conservatives, the internal structure of ideology, and the moral content of political messaging. A recurring theme is that the explanatory power of universalism for left-wing policy views and voting is considerably larger than that of traditional economic variables. Looking at the origins of heterogeneity in universalism, an emerging consensus is that cross-group variation is partly economically functional and reflects that morality evolved to support cooperation in economic production. This insight organizes much work on how kinship systems, market exposure, political institutions and ecology have shaped universalism through their impacts on the relative benefits of localized and impersonal interactions.
31701.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了日益增长的经济学文献，这些文献研究了个体和跨文化道德边界异质性的政治经济影响。所谓的普遍主义与特殊主义分歧已成为当代政治竞争各种显著特征背后的主要组织原则，包括个体层面和空间层面的投票差异、富裕自由派与贫穷保守派的重组、意识形态的内部结构以及政治信息的道德内容。一个反复出现的主题是，普遍主义对左翼政策观点和投票的解释力远大于传统经济变量。审视普遍主义异质性的起源，一个正在形成的共识是，跨群体差异部分具有经济功能性，并反映了道德为支持经济生产中的合作而演化。这一见解组织了大量关于亲属制度、市场暴露、政治制度和生态如何通过影响本地化与去个人化互动的相对收益来塑造普遍主义的研究。

31700.title: Reluctant Entrepreneurs: Evidence from China’s SOE Reform
31700.zh_title: 不情愿的企业家：来自中国国企改革的证据
31700.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, Zenan Wu, Yapei Zhang
31700.abstract: We study the impact of state-owned enterprises (SOEs) on the quality of entrepreneurship in China. Using long series of firm registration and performance data, we document that the massive SOE downsizing in the late 1990s significantly improved the quality of entrepreneur- ship. Compared with entrepreneurs in other time periods, firms founded by the reluctant entrepreneurs induced by the SOE layoffs have better performances. To explain these results, we present a simple model of occupational choices where high-skilled individuals obtain a higher value than low-skilled individuals from the benefits offered by SOE jobs, leading them to select into the SOE sector in the pre SOE reform era. When the SOE sector was downsized, some high-skilled SOE employees were reluctantly unleashed into entrepreneurship. We also provide corroborating evidence for other implications of the model.
31700.zh_abstract: 我们研究了国有企业对创业质量的影响。利用长期的企业注册和绩效数据序列，我们记录了20世纪90年代末大规模的国企裁员显著提高了创业质量。与其他时期的企业家相比，由国企裁员引发的“不情愿的企业家”所创立的企业表现更好。为了解释这些结果，我们提出了一个简单的职业选择模型，其中高技能个体从国企工作提供的福利中获得比低技能个体更高的价值，导致他们在国企改革前选择进入国企部门。当国企部门被裁减时，一些高技能国企员工不情愿地被释放到创业领域。我们还为模型的其他含义提供了佐证证据。
31700.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：J08, J28, J68, L26

31728.title: Adjusting for Scale-Use Heterogeneity in Self-Reported Well-Being
31728.zh_title: 自我报告幸福感中量表使用异质性的调整
31728.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Kristen Cooper, Ori Heffetz, Miles S. Kimball, Jiannan Zhou
31728.abstract: Analyses of self-reported-well-being (SWB) survey data may be confounded if people use response scales differently. We use calibration questions, designed to have the same objective answer across respondents, to measure dimensional (i.e., specific to an SWB dimension) and general (i.e., common across questions) scale-use heterogeneity. In a sample of ~3,350 MTurkers, we find substantial such heterogeneity that is correlated with demographics. We develop a theoretical framework and econometric approaches to quantify and adjust for this heterogeneity. We apply our new estimators in several standard SWB applications. Adjusting for general-scale-use heterogeneity changes results in some cases.
31728.zh_abstract: 如果人们以不同方式使用回答量表，对自我报告幸福感（SWB）调查数据的分析可能会受到混淆。我们使用校准问题（这些问题旨在让所有受访者得到相同的客观答案）来衡量维度特定（即特定于SWB维度）和一般（即跨问题通用）的量表使用异质性。在一个约3350名MTurk用户的样本中，我们发现存在显著的此类异质性，并且与人口统计学特征相关。我们开发了一个理论框架和计量经济学方法来量化并调整这种异质性。我们在几个标准的SWB应用中应用了我们的新估计量。在某些情况下，调整一般量表使用异质性会改变结果。
31728.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C83, D60, D63, D90, D91, I14, I31

31727.title: From Happiness Data to Economic Conclusions
31727.zh_title: 从幸福感数据到经济结论
31727.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Kristen Cooper, Ori Heffetz, Miles S. Kimball
31727.abstract: Happiness data—survey respondents’ self-reported well-being (SWB)—have become increasingly common in economics research, with recent calls to use them in policymaking. Researchers have used SWB data in novel ways, for example to learn about welfare or preferences when choice data are unavailable or difficult to interpret. Focusing on leading examples of this pioneering research, the first part of this review uses a simple theoretical framework to reverse-engineer some of the crucial assumptions that underlie existing applications. The second part discusses evidence bearing on these assumptions and provides practical advice to the agencies and institutions that generate SWB data, the researchers who use them, and the policymakers who may use the resulting research. While we advocate creative uses of SWB data in economics, we caution that their use in policy will likely require both additional data collection and further research to better understand the data.
31727.zh_abstract: 幸福感数据——调查受访者自我报告的幸福感（SWB）——在经济学研究中越来越常见，最近有人呼吁将其用于政策制定。研究人员以新颖的方式使用SWB数据，例如在选择数据不可得或难以解释时，用以了解福利或偏好。本综述的第一部分聚焦于这一开创性研究的典型案例，使用一个简单的理论框架来逆向推导出支撑现有应用的一些关键假设。第二部分讨论了支持这些假设的证据，并为生成SWB数据的机构和组织、使用这些数据的研究人员以及可能使用由此产生的研究成果的政策制定者提供实用建议。虽然我们倡导在经济学中创造性地使用SWB数据，但我们提醒，将其用于政策可能既需要额外的数据收集，也需要进一步的研究以更好地理解这些数据。
31727.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D60, D63, D9, I31

31726.title: Time Preferences and Food Choice
31726.authors: Andy Brownback, Alex Imas, Michael A. Kuhn
31726.abstract: Healthy food choices are a canonical example used to illustrate the importance of time preferences in behavioral economics. However, the literature lacks a direct demonstration that they are well-predicted by incentivized time preference measures. We offer direct evidence by combining a novel, two-question, incentivized time preference measurement with data from a field experiment that includes grocery purchases and consumption. Our present-focus measure is highly predictive of food choice, capturing a number of behaviors consistent with self-control problems, which provides direct evidence for the common assumption that important aspects of nutrition are driven by time preferences.
31726.zh_abstract: 健康的食物选择是行为经济学中用于说明时间偏好重要性的典型例子。然而，现有文献缺乏直接证明它们能被激励性的时间偏好测量所良好预测的证据。我们通过将一种新颖的、包含两个问题的激励性时间偏好测量与来自一项包含杂货购买和消费的实地实验的数据相结合，提供了直接证据。我们的当前关注度测量对食物选择具有高度预测性，捕捉到了一系列与自我控制问题一致的行为，这为营养的重要方面由时间偏好驱动的常见假设提供了直接证据。
31726.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, PE；JEL：D03, H20, I12, I39

31725.title: The Minimum Wage and Inequality Between Groups
31725.zh_title: 最低工资与群体间不平等
31725.authors: Francine D. Blau, Isaac Cohen, Matthew L. Comey, Lawrence Kahn, Nikolai Boboshko
31725.abstract: Using 1979-2019 Current Population Survey data, we study the effect of state and federal minimum wage policies on gender, race, and ethnic inequality. We find that minimum wages substantially reduce intergroup wage inequality at least up to the 20th wage percentile, with no evidence of adverse employment effects. We conduct counterfactual simulations of between-group inequality due to minimum wage changes since 1979. Declines in the real minimum wage in the 1980s slowed progress in narrowing between-group inequality. Relatively small changes in minimum wages during 1989-1998 and 1998-2007 meant little role for the minimum wage over those time spans. Since 2007, several states have steeply raised their minimum wages, especially raising Hispanics’ relative wages, because they earn low wages and reside disproportionately in those states. Finally, we find that raising the federal minimum wage to $\$12$/hour in 2020 dollars ($\$14.49$ in 2025Q2 dollars) would reduce existing between-group wage gaps below the 15th percentile by 25-50%.
31725.zh_abstract: 利用1979-2019年当前人口调查数据，我们研究了州和联邦最低工资政策对性别、种族和民族不平等的影响。我们发现，最低工资至少在第20个工资百分位数以下显著减少了群体间工资不平等，且没有发现不利的就业效应的证据。我们对1979年以来因最低工资变化导致的群体间不平等进行了反事实模拟。1980年代实际最低工资的下降减缓了缩小群体间不平等的进展。1989-1998年和1998-2007年期间最低工资的相对较小变化意味着最低工资在这段时间内作用不大。自2007年以来，几个州大幅提高了最低工资，尤其提高了西班牙裔的相对工资，因为他们工资较低且不成比例地居住在这些州。最后，我们发现，将联邦最低工资提高到2020年美元计算的12美元/小时（2025年第二季度美元计算的14.49美元/小时），将使第15个百分位数以下现有的群体间工资差距缩小25-50%。

31724.title: Centralization and Organization Reproduction: Ethnic Innovation in R&D Centers and Satellite Locations
31724.zh_title: 集权化与组织复制：研发中心与卫星地点的族裔创新
31724.abstract: We study the relationship between firm centralization and organizational reproduction in satellite locations. For decentralized firms, the ethnic compositions of inventors in satellite locations mostly resemble their host cities, with little link to the inventor composition of their parent firms' R&D headquarters. For highly centralized firms, by contrast, organizational reproduction has an explanatory power equal to half or more of the host city effect. Reproduction is strongest when a firm exhibits a hands-on approach to the satellite facility, such as cross-facility team collaboration or internal talent mobility.
31724.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业集权化与卫星地点组织复制之间的关系。对于分权企业而言，卫星地点的发明人族裔构成主要与其所在城市相似，与母公司研发总部的发明人构成关联甚微。相比之下，对于高度集权的企业，组织复制对发明人族裔构成的解释力达到或超过所在城市效应的一半。当企业对卫星设施采取亲力亲为的方式（例如跨设施团队协作或内部人才流动）时，组织复制效应最为显著。
31724.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：F22, F23, J61, L22, L25, M51, O31, O32, R11, R12

31723.title: Economic Consequences of a Regime Change: Overview
31723.zh_title: 政权更迭的经济后果：概述
31723.abstract: Regime changes toward autocracy typically reshape the judicial framework, effectively eroding the separation of powers and leading the nation toward an autocratic path. Recent instances of regime shift in Hungary, Poland, and Turkey offer templates of democratic erosion through manipulation and “democratic” means. Israel is in now amid a conflicting judicial overhaul. Whereas the manifestations of these patterns differ based on the distinct political, social, and historical contexts of each country, they invariably erode the Rule of Law and the democratic institutions. Their ideological stance sharply contrasts with the democratic norms upheld by major Western nations: the separation of powers, judicial autonomy, and the intricate web of political, civic, and social organizations cultivated since the Enlightenment. These century-old trends have been instrumental in fostering unprecedented prosperity. This paper overviews the economic consequences of regime changes from liberal democracy towards autocracy.
31723.zh_abstract: 向威权主义的政权更迭通常会重塑司法框架，有效削弱权力分立，并引导国家走向威权道路。近期匈牙利、波兰和土耳其的政权转变案例，提供了通过操纵和“民主”手段侵蚀民主的模板。以色列目前正陷入一场相互冲突的司法改革之中。尽管这些模式的表现形式因各国独特的政治、社会和历史背景而异，但它们无一例外地侵蚀了法治和民主制度。其意识形态立场与西方主要国家所秉持的民主规范——即权力分立、司法自主，以及自启蒙运动以来培育的政治、公民和社会组织的复杂网络——形成鲜明对比。这些延续数百年的趋势曾极大地促进了前所未有的繁荣。本文概述了从自由民主向威权主义政权更迭的经济后果。

31722.title: Bonus Question: How Does Flexible Incentive Pay Affect Wage Rigidity?
31722.zh_title: 奖金问题：弹性激励薪酬如何影响工资刚性？
31722.authors: Meghana Gaur, John R. Grigsby, Jonathon Hazell, Abdoulaye Ndiaye
31722.abstract: We introduce dynamic incentive contracts into a model of inflation and unemployment dynamics. Our main result is that wage cyclicality from incentives neither affects the slope of the Phillips curve for prices nor dampens unemployment’s response to shocks. The impulse response of unemployment in economies with flexible, procyclical incentive pay is first-order equivalent to that of economies with rigid wages. Likewise, the slope of the Phillips curve is the same in both economies. This equivalence is due to effort fluctuations, which make marginal costs rigid even if wages are flexible. Our calibrated model suggests that 46% of the wage cyclicality in the data arises from incentives, with the remainder attributable to bargaining and outside options. A standard model without incentives calibrated to weakly procyclical wages matches the impulse response of unemployment in our incentive pay model calibrated to strongly procyclical wages.
31722.zh_abstract: 我们将动态激励合同引入一个通胀与失业动态模型。我们的主要结论是：由激励产生的工资周期性既不影响价格菲利普斯曲线的斜率，也不削弱失业对冲击的反应。在具有弹性、顺周期激励薪酬的经济体中，失业的脉冲响应与工资刚性经济体在首阶上等价。同样，两种经济体的菲利普斯曲线斜率也相同。这种等价性源于努力水平的波动，即使工资具有弹性，边际成本仍保持刚性。我们的校准模型表明，数据中46%的工资周期性源于激励，其余部分归因于议价和外部选择。一个不含激励、校准为弱顺周期工资的标准模型，其失业脉冲响应与我们的激励薪酬模型（校准为强顺周期工资）相匹配。
31722.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E32, J33, J41, J64

31721.title: Credit Supply Shocks and Firm Dynamics: Evidence from Brazil
31721.zh_title: 信贷供给冲击与企业动态：来自巴西的证据
31721.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Marc-Andreas Muendler, Raquel F. Oliveira, James E. Rauch
31721.abstract: We explore how financial constraints distort the entry decisions among otherwise productive entrepreneurs and limit growth of promising young firms. A model of liquidity-constrained entrepreneurs suggests that the easing of credit constraints can induce more entry of firms with greater long-run growth potential than the easing of conventional entry barriers would bring about. We explore this growth mechanism using a large-scale program to expand the supply of credit to small and medium enterprises in Brazil. Local credit supply shocks generate greater firm entry but also greater exit with no effect on short-run employment growth in the formal sector. However, credit expansions increase average capability among entering firms, which enter at larger size, survive longer, and grow faster. These firm dynamics are more pronounced in areas with weaker credit markets ex ante and consistent with local bank branches using cheap targeted credit lines to expand lending more broadly. Our findings provide new evidence on the general equilibrium effects of credit supply expansions.
31721.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了金融约束如何扭曲原本富有生产力的企业家的进入决策，并限制有前途的年轻企业的增长。一个流动性受限企业家的模型表明，放松信贷约束可以比放松传统进入壁垒更能诱导具有更大长期增长潜力的企业进入。我们利用巴西一项旨在扩大中小企业信贷供给的大规模项目来探究这一增长机制。地方信贷供给冲击导致企业进入增加，但退出也增加，且对正规部门的短期就业增长没有影响。然而，信贷扩张提高了进入企业的平均能力，这些企业以更大规模进入、存活时间更长且增长更快。这些企业动态在事前信贷市场较弱的地区更为显著，并且与当地银行分支机构利用廉价定向信贷额度更广泛地扩大贷款的做法一致。我们的发现为信贷供给扩张的总体均衡效应提供了新证据。
31721.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IO, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：D21, D22, D92, L25, L26, M13, O12

31720.title: Cash Transfers and Social Preferences of Children
31720.zh_title: 现金转移与儿童的社会偏好
31720.authors: Johannes Haushofer, Magdalena Larreboure, Sara Lowes, Leon Mait
31720.abstract: We study the effects of an unconditional cash transfer program on social preferences of children. The program allocated $\$1,076$ to randomly selected households in rural Kenya. We measure the social preferences of 4,022 children from 1,687 households with survey questions and incentivized behavioral games three years after the intervention. We distinguish between the direct effects on children of recipient households and the spillover effects on children of neighboring households. We do not find consistent evidence that children from treatment and spillover groups are more or less prosocial than children from the control group. Additionally, we find no persistent economic effects of the program. We find some evidence of reduced psychological well-being among adults and children in spillover households.
31720.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项无条件现金转移项目对儿童社会偏好的影响。该项目向肯尼亚农村随机选择的家庭发放了1076美元。在干预三年后，我们通过调查问卷和激励性行为游戏，测量了来自1687个家庭的4022名儿童的社会偏好。我们区分了对受助家庭儿童的直接影响和对邻近家庭儿童的溢出效应。我们没有发现一致证据表明来自处理组和溢出组的儿童比来自对照组的儿童更亲社会或更不亲社会。此外，我们未发现该项目具有持续的经济效应。我们发现了溢出组家庭中成人和儿童心理健康状况下降的一些证据。
31720.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, POL；JEL：C92, C93, D31, I38, O12

31719.title: High-Dimensional Factor Models and the Factor Zoo
31719.zh_title: 高维因子模型与因子动物园
31719.abstract: This paper proposes a new approach to the “factor zoo” conundrum. Instead of applying dimension-reduction methods to a large set of portfolio returns obtained from sorts on characteristics, I construct factors that summarize the information in characteristics across assets and then sort assets into portfolios according to these “characteristic factors”. I estimate the model on a data set of mutual fund characteristics. Since the data set is 3-dimensional (characteristics of funds over time), characteristic factors are based on a tensor factor model (TFM) that is a generalization of 2-dimensional PCA. I find that parsimonious TFM captures over 90% of the variation in the data set. Pricing factors derived from the TFM have high Sharpe ratios and capture the cross-section of fund returns better than standard benchmark models.
31719.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种解决“因子动物园”难题的新方法。我不对基于特征排序得到的大量投资组合收益应用降维方法，而是构建能够汇总跨资产特征信息的因子，然后根据这些“特征因子”将资产分类为投资组合。我在一个共同基金特征数据集上估计该模型。由于该数据集是三维的（基金特征随时间变化），特征因子基于张量因子模型（TFM），该模型是二维主成分分析（PCA）的推广。我发现，简约的TFM能够捕捉数据集中超过90%的变异。从TFM导出的定价因子具有较高的夏普比率，并且比标准基准模型更好地捕捉了基金收益的横截面特征。

31718.title: Science, Philanthropy, and American Leadership
31718.zh_title: 科学、慈善与美国领导力
31718.authors: Robert W. Conn, Peter F. Cowhey, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Christopher L. Martin
31718.abstract: Investments in the US Science, Technology, Engineering, Medicine and Innovation (STEMI) enterprise come from many different sectors and their combined effect crucially enhances the nation’s competitiveness. Philanthropy is an under-appreciated component of this ecosystem, providing $\$21.5$ billion of research funding at universities and non-profits in 2021 or roughly 42% of the federal outlay at these institutions. In this paper, we argue that these decentralized and diverse set of philanthropic funders alter the incentives and behavior within the US research enterprise to make it more risk tolerant and more innovative than government or business funding alone would yield. It also enables significant innovation in the development of human capital in STEMI areas. We conclude with a comparison of the US research ecosystem to that of China to understand how the two systems differ, with a particular emphasis on the differentiating role that philanthropy may play in influencing the scientific and economic competitiveness of each nation.
31718.zh_abstract: 对美国科学、技术、工程、医学与创新（STEMI）事业的投入来自众多不同部门，其综合效应极大地提升了国家的竞争力。慈善事业是这一生态系统中一个未被充分重视的组成部分，2021年它为大学和非营利组织提供了215亿美元的研究经费，约占联邦对这些机构拨款的42%。在本文中，我们认为，这些分散且多样化的慈善资助者改变了美国研究体系内的激励和行为，使其比仅靠政府或商业资助更具风险容忍度和创新性。它还促进了STEMI领域人力资本开发的重大创新。最后，我们将美国研究生态系统与中国进行比较，以理解两个体系的差异，特别强调了慈善在影响两国科学和经济竞争力方面可能发挥的差异化作用。

31717.title: Welfare Accounting
31717.abstract: This paper develops a welfare accounting decomposition that identifies and quantifies the ultimate origins of welfare gains and losses in general economies with heterogeneous individuals and disaggregated production. The decomposition---exclusively based on preferences and technologies---first separates efficiency from redistribution considerations. Efficiency comprises individual efficiency, which traces gains and losses to reallocating consumption and factor supply across individuals, and production efficiency, which captures allocative efficiency gains and losses due to adjusting intermediate inputs and factors, as well as technical efficiency gains and losses from primitive changes in technologies and factor endowments. Leveraging the decomposition, we characterize efficiency conditions in disaggregated production economies with heterogeneous individuals, extending classic efficiency results. In competitive economies, prices (and wedges) are directly informative about the welfare-relevant statistics that shape the welfare accounting decomposition, which allows us to characterize a generalized Hulten's theorem. We present several minimal examples and a rich application to monetary policy.
31717.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一种福利核算分解方法，用于识别和量化在具有异质性个体和细分生产的总体经济中福利损益的最终来源。该分解完全基于偏好和技术，首先将效率与再分配考量分离开来。效率包括个体效率（追踪因消费和要素供给在个体间重新配置而产生的损益）和生产效率（捕捉因调整中间投入和要素而产生的配置效率损益，以及因技术和要素禀赋的原始变化而产生的技术效率损益）。利用这一分解，我们刻画了具有异质性个体的细分生产经济中的效率条件，扩展了经典的效率结论。在竞争性经济中，价格（和楔子）直接提供了关于塑造福利核算分解的福利相关统计量的信息，这使我们能够刻画一个广义的Hulten定理。我们给出了几个最小示例以及一个应用于货币政策的丰富案例。

31716.title: The International Monetary System and International Financial System as an Analogy to the Copernican Heliocentric system: A simple multi-layers network model with simultaneous regime changes
31716.zh_title: 国际货币体系与国际金融体系：类比哥白尼日心体系——一个包含同步体制变迁的简单多层网络模型
31716.abstract: The evolution of the IMS and IFS in the past several hundred years can be viewed through the lens of the Copernican heliocentric system developed over 500 years ago. We trace out the evolution across regimes of the IMS and IFS in terms of network representations of the Copernican system. We provide a simple, fully testable theoretical model whose assumptions are based on these representations. The IMS and IFS are described by a two-layer graph whose three key features (hub, core, distances) are affected by nonlinear joint regime changes linked to a technological, institutional, geopolitical and regulatory environment variable. We conclude with a discussion of some perspectives of the future of the international monetary and financial systems. Our analysis is based on economic history, theory and some resonant concepts from astrophysics.
31716.zh_abstract: 过去数百年间国际货币体系与国际金融体系的演变，可以通过500多年前形成的哥白尼日心体系视角加以审视。我们以哥白尼体系的网络表征形式，追溯了国际货币体系与国际金融体系在不同体制间的演变过程。我们提出了一个简单且完全可检验的理论模型，其假设基于这些表征。国际货币体系与国际金融体系由一个双层图描述，其三个关键特征（枢纽、核心、距离）受到与技术、制度、地缘政治和监管环境变量相关的非线性联合体制变迁的影响。最后，我们讨论了国际货币与金融体系未来的一些前景。我们的分析基于经济史、理论以及天体物理学中的一些共鸣概念。
31716.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：C3, C82, E42, F33, G15, N2

31715.title: Drivers of Change: How Intra-household Preferences Shape Employment Responses to Gender Reform
31715.zh_title: 变革的驱动力：家庭内部偏好如何塑造对性别改革的就业反应
31715.authors: Chaza Abou Daher, Erica M. Field, Kendal M. Swanson, Kate H. Vyborny
31715.abstract: Billions of women still face legal barriers to economic inclusion, yet it is unclear whether lifting these barriers is sufficient to enhance their economic participation. We conduct a field experiment to quantify the impact of a major legal reform - the lifting of the Saudi women's driving ban - on women's employment by randomizing rationed spaces in driver's training. Two years later, women in the treatment group are 61% more likely to drive, 19% more likely to leave the house unchaperoned, and 35% more likely to be employed. However, they are also 19% more likely to require permission to make purchases. These patterns vary systematically with marital status: although physical mobility increases for all women, treatment effects on employment are only observed among never-married and widowed women, who negotiate employment with their fathers. Married and divorced women with children, over whom husbands and ex-husbands have leverage, actually exit the labor force and experience decreased spending autonomy. We posit that these patterns reflect differences in male family members' support for women's employment. They provide evidence that men's resistance to wives' employment poses a binding constraint to female labor force participation when legal restrictions are relaxed, but also that men are more open to granting their daughters economic rights, as has been posited in the literature. The results underscore the importance of intra-household responses to gender reforms, which have the potential to counteract legal gains in women's freedoms, and help explain why potential economic gains from lifting discriminatory laws often go unrealized.
31715.zh_abstract: 数十亿女性仍面临经济融入的法律障碍，但尚不清楚消除这些障碍是否足以提升她们的经济参与。我们通过一项实地实验，将驾校培训的配额随机分配，以量化一项重大法律改革——沙特女性驾驶禁令的解除——对女性就业的影响。两年后，处理组女性驾驶的可能性提高61%，无监护人陪伴外出的可能性提高19%，就业的可能性提高35%。然而，她们在购物时需要获得许可的可能性也提高了19%。这些模式随婚姻状况系统性地变化：尽管所有女性的身体流动性均有所增加，但就业的处理效应仅在从未结婚和丧偶的女性中观察到，她们与父亲协商就业。而已婚和有子女的离婚女性——其丈夫和前夫对她们具有影响力——实际上退出了劳动力市场，且消费自主权下降。我们假设这些模式反映了男性家庭成员对女性就业支持程度的差异。它们提供了证据表明，当法律限制放松时，男性对妻子就业的抵制构成了女性劳动参与的一个约束性障碍，但也表明男性更愿意赋予女儿经济权利，正如文献中所假设的那样。这些结果强调了家庭内部对性别改革的反应的重要性，这种反应可能抵消女性在法律上获得的自由，并有助于解释为何消除歧视性法律的潜在经济收益往往未能实现。

31713.title: Institutional Drift, Property Rights, and Economic Development: Evidence from Historical Treaties
31713.zh_title: 制度漂移、产权与经济发展：来自历史条约的证据
31713.authors: Donn L. Feir, Rob Gillezeau, Maggie E.C. Jones
31713.abstract: For nearly three centuries, Indigenous peoples within the borders of present-day Canada engaged in treaty-making with the British Crown and other European powers. These treaties regularly formed the colonial legal basis for access to Indigenous lands. However, treaties were not negotiated everywhere, including in regions subsequently settled by Europeans. Consequentially, there is substantial regional variation in the legal status of occupied lands, jurisdiction over natural resources, and state commitments to Indigenous nations. We study how these legal institutions have shaped the path of economic development in Indigenous communities. Using restricted-access census data, we show that historical treaties substantially lower income in Indigenous communities today. We argue that this results from the constitutional and legal recognition of Aboriginal rights and title, which have dramatically increased bargaining power and, consequently, income growth in non-treaty Indigenous communities.
31713.zh_abstract: 近三个世纪以来，位于现今加拿大境内的原住民与英国王室及其他欧洲列强进行了条约制定。这些条约通常构成了获取原住民土地的殖民法律基础。然而，条约并非在所有地区都进行了谈判，包括后来被欧洲人定居的区域。因此，在已占用土地的法律地位、自然资源管辖权以及国家对原住民民族的承诺方面，存在显著的地区差异。我们研究这些法律制度如何塑造了原住民社区的经济发展路径。利用受限访问的人口普查数据，我们表明历史条约显著降低了当今原住民社区的收入。我们认为，这是由于宪法和法律对原住民权利和所有权的承认，这极大地增强了非条约原住民社区的议价能力，从而促进了其收入增长。
31713.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, POL；JEL：J15, N31, N32, P14

31712.title: Education Gradients in Parental Time Investment and Subjective Well-being
31712.zh_title: 父母时间投入与主观幸福感的受教育程度梯度
31712.authors: Ariel Kalil, Susan Mayer, William Delgado, Lisa A. Gennetian
31712.abstract: College-educated mothers spend substantially more time in intensive childcare than less educated mothers despite their higher opportunity cost of time and working more hours. Using data from the 2010–2013 and 2021 waves of the Well-being Module of the American Time Use Survey, we investigate this puzzle by testing the hypothesis that college-educated mothers enjoy childcare more. We find that among all mothers, spending time in childcare is associated with higher positive feelings compared to spending time in other activities. However, college-educated mothers experience no more positive feelings and no fewer negative feelings during intensive childcare than other mothers. Moreover, college-educated mothers report substantially fewer positive feelings for time spent in management activities and substantially more negative feelings for time spent in educational activities with their child. Findings are robust to controlling for a rich set of covariates, mother fixed effects, and simulations to account for selection into intensive childcare.
31712.zh_abstract: 受过大学教育的母亲在密集育儿上花费的时间远多于受教育程度较低的母亲，尽管她们的时间机会成本更高且工作时间更长。利用2010-2013年和2021年美国人时间使用调查幸福感模块的数据，我们通过检验“受过大学教育的母亲更享受育儿”这一假设来探究这一谜题。我们发现，在所有母亲中，与其他活动相比，花时间育儿与更高的积极情绪相关。然而，在密集育儿期间，受过大学教育的母亲并不比其他母亲体验到更多的积极情绪或更少的消极情绪。此外，受过大学教育的母亲在管理活动上花费时间时报告的积极情绪显著更少，在与孩子一起进行教育活动时报告的消极情绪显著更多。这些发现在控制丰富的协变量、母亲固定效应以及考虑密集育儿选择性的模拟后依然稳健。

31711.title: Illiquid Lemon Markets and the Macroeconomy
31711.zh_title: 非流动性柠檬市场与宏观经济
31711.authors: Aimé Bierdel, Andres Drenik, Juan Herreño, Pablo Ottonello
31711.abstract: We study the macroeconomic implications of asymmetric information in capital markets. We build a quantitative capital-accumulation model in which capital is traded in illiquid markets, with sellers having more information about capital quality than buyers. Asymmetric information distorts the terms of trade for sellers of high-quality capital, who list higher prices and are willing to accept lower trading probabilities to signal their type. Led by the model's predictions, we measure the distortions from asymmetric information by studying the relationship between listed prices and trading probabilities in a unique dataset of individual capital units listed for trade. By combining the empirical measurement with the model, we show that information asymmetries can play a quantitatively large role during economic crises when the degree of asymmetric information deteriorates.
31711.zh_abstract: 我们研究资本市场信息不对称的宏观经济含义。我们构建了一个定量资本积累模型，其中资本在非流动性市场上交易，卖方比买方拥有更多关于资本质量的信息。信息不对称扭曲了高质量资本卖方的交易条件，他们标价更高并愿意接受更低的交易概率以显示其类型。在模型预测的引导下，我们通过研究一个独特的待交易单个资本单位数据集中标价与交易概率之间的关系，来衡量信息不对称造成的扭曲。通过将实证测量与模型相结合，我们表明，在经济危机期间，当信息不对称程度恶化时，信息不对称可能发挥数量上显著的作用。
31711.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：D82, E22, E32

31710.title: Minimum Lot Size Restrictions: Impacts on Urban Form and House Price at the Border
31710.zh_title: 最小地块面积限制：对边界处城市形态和房价的影响
31710.abstract: We estimate the impact of more stringent minimum lot size restrictions across small border areas of neighboring communities using data from the Wharton Residential Land Use Regulatory Index (WRLURI) surveys. Economically meaningful effects are found on the built environment, not just house prices. Within 100 meters of the borders, housing density as reflected in the number of single family homes per acre is about 11% lower on average in the most restricted communities compared to the least restricted communities in terms of minimum lot sizes. Individual homes are bigger by about 80 square feet, an amount equal to about 4% of typical unit square footage. Lots are over 3,000 square feet larger in the most restricted compared to the least restricted communities’ border areas, an increase equal to 28% of the sample mean lot size. Hence, among the smaller number of homes that exist in the most regulated places, their physical structures are modestly bigger and they sit on appreciably larger lots. Finally, house prices are nearly $\$30,000$ higher in the more regulated border areas compared to the least regulated border areas. This price impact can be accounted for by differences in house quality, structure and lot size specifically, on the two sides of a border.
31710.zh_abstract: 我们利用沃顿住宅土地利用监管指数调查的数据，估算了相邻社区小边界区域内更严格的最小地块面积限制的影响。在建筑环境（而不仅仅是房价）上发现了具有经济意义的影响。在边界100米范围内，以每英亩独栋住宅数量反映的住房密度，在最小地块面积限制最严格的社区中，平均比最不严格的社区低约11%。单个住宅面积大约大80平方英尺，相当于典型单元面积的4%左右。在最严格社区与最不严格社区的边界区域，地块面积大出超过3000平方英尺，相当于样本平均地块面积的28%。因此，在监管最严格的地方存在的较少数量的住宅中，其物理结构略大，且坐落于明显更大的地块上。最后，与监管最不严格的边界区域相比，监管更严格的边界区域的房价高出近3万美元。这种价格影响可以归因于边界两侧在房屋质量、结构和地块面积上的具体差异。

31709.title: Impulse Response Functions for Self-Exciting Nonlinear Models
31709.zh_title: 自激非线性模型的脉冲响应函数
31709.authors: Neville Francis, Michael Owyang, Daniel F. Soques
31709.abstract: We calculate impulse response functions from regime-switching models where the driving variable can respond to the shock. Two methods used to estimate the impulse responses in these models are generalized impulse response functions and local projections. Local projections depend on the observed switches in the data, while generalized impulse response functions rely on correctly specifying regime process. Using Monte Carlos with different misspecifications, we determine under what conditions either method is preferred. We then extend model-average impulse responses to this nonlinear environment and show that they generally perform better than either generalized impulse response functions and local projections. Finally, we apply these findings to the empirical estimation of regime-dependent fiscal multipliers and find multipliers less than one and generally small differences across different states of slack.
31709.zh_abstract: 我们计算了体制转换模型的脉冲响应函数，其中驱动变量可以对冲击做出反应。用于估计这些模型中脉冲响应的两种方法是广义脉冲响应函数和局部投影法。局部投影法依赖于数据中观察到的体制转换，而广义脉冲响应函数依赖于正确设定体制过程。通过使用不同错误设定的蒙特卡洛模拟，我们确定了在何种条件下哪种方法更优。然后，我们将模型平均脉冲响应扩展到这种非线性环境，并表明它们通常比广义脉冲响应函数和局部投影法表现更好。最后，我们将这些发现应用于体制依赖财政乘数的实证估计，发现乘数小于1，且不同松弛状态之间的差异通常很小。

31708.title: Structural Transformation and Value Change: The British Abolitionist Movement
31708.zh_title: 结构转型与价值观变迁：英国废奴运动
31708.abstract: What drives change in a society’s values? From Marx to modernization theory, scholars have identified a connection between structural transformation and social change. To understand how changes in a society’s dominant mode of production affect its dominant values, we examine the case of the movement for the abolition of slavery in the late 18th and early 19th century Britain, one of history’s most well-known campaigns for social change, which coincided temporally with the Industrial Revolution. We argue that structural transformation alters the distribution of power in society and enables groups with distinct values and weak economic interest in the status quo to mobilize for change. Using data on anti-slavery petitions, membership in abolitionist groups, MP voting behavior in Parliament and economic activity, we show that support for abolition was strongly connected to manufacturing at the aggregate and individual level. We rely on biographical data and the analysis of parliamentary speeches to show that industrialists were relatively less reliant on income from slavery and were characterized by a universalist worldview that distinguished them from established elites. Together, our findings suggest that both values and economic interest play a role in driving social change.
31708.zh_abstract: 是什么驱动了社会价值观的变迁？从马克思到现代化理论，学者们已经认识到结构转型与社会变革之间的联系。为了理解社会主导生产模式的变化如何影响其主导价值观，我们研究了18世纪末19世纪初英国废奴运动这一案例，这是历史上最著名的社会变革运动之一，在时间上与工业革命重合。我们认为，结构转型改变了社会中的权力分配，并使具有独特价值观且对现状经济兴趣薄弱的群体能够动员起来推动变革。利用关于反奴隶制请愿书、废奴团体成员身份、议会中议员投票行为以及经济活动的数据，我们表明，在总体和个人层面，对废奴的支持与制造业密切相关。我们依靠传记资料和对议会演讲的分析来表明，工业家相对较少依赖奴隶制收入，并且具有一种将他们与既有精英区分开来的普世主义世界观。总之，我们的发现表明，价值观和经济利益都在推动社会变革中发挥作用。

31707.title: Utility and Happiness
31707.authors: Miles S. Kimball, Robert J. Willis
31707.abstract: Psychologists have developed effective survey methods of measuring how happy people feel at a given time. The relationship between how happy a person feels and utility is an unresolved question. Existing work in Economics either ignores happiness data or assumes that felt happiness is more or less the same thing as flow utility. The approach we propose in this paper steers a middle course between the two polar views that “happiness is irrelevant to Economics” and the view that “happiness is a sufficient statistic for utility.” \nWe argue that felt happiness is not the same thing as flow utility, but that it does have a systematic relationship to utility. In particular, we propose that happiness is the sum of two components: (1) elation–or short-run happiness–which depends on recent news about lifetime utility and (2) baseline mood–or long-run happiness–which is a subutility function much like health, entertainment, or nutrition. In principle, all of the usual techniques of price theory apply to baseline mood, but the application of those techniques is complicated by the fact that many people may not know the true household production function for baseline mood. \nIf this theory is on target, there are two reasons data on felt happiness is important for Economics. First, short-run happiness in response to news can give important information about preferences. Second, long-run happiness is important for economic welfare in the same way as other higher-order goods such as health, entertainment, or nutrition.
31707.zh_abstract: 心理学家已开发出有效的调查方法来测量人们在特定时刻感受到的幸福程度。一个人感受到的幸福与效用之间的关系是一个尚未解决的问题。经济学现有的研究要么忽视幸福感数据，要么假设感受到的幸福大致等同于流量效用。本文提出的方法在“幸福感与经济学无关”和“幸福感是效用的充分统计量”这两种极端观点之间走了一条中间路线。我们认为，感受到的幸福并不等同于流量效用，但它确实与效用存在系统性关联。具体而言，我们提出幸福感由两个部分组成：(1) 兴奋感——或短期幸福感——它取决于关于终身效用的近期信息；(2) 基线情绪——或长期幸福感——它是一种类似于健康、娱乐或营养的子效用函数。原则上，所有价格理论的常规技术都适用于基线情绪，但这些技术的应用因许多人可能不知道基线情绪的真实家庭生产函数这一事实而变得复杂。如果这一理论是准确的，那么感受到的幸福数据对经济学之所以重要有两个原因。首先，对信息做出反应的短期幸福感可以提供关于偏好的重要信息。其次，长期幸福感对于经济福利的重要性，与健康、娱乐或营养等其他高阶商品相同。

31706.title: The Importance of a Helping Hand in Education and in Life
31706.zh_title: 教育及人生中援手的重要性
31706.authors: Francisco Gallego, Philip Oreopoulos, Noah Spencer
31706.abstract: This paper discusses the importance of incorporating personal assistance into interventions aimed at improving long-term education and labor market success. While existing research demonstrates the cost-effectiveness of low-touch behavioral nudges, this paper argues that the dynamic nature of human capital accumulation requires sustained habits over time. To foster better habits, social connections are critical for encouraging enduring effort and intrinsic motivation. The paper showcases examples from various stages of human capital accumulation, including early childhood, adolescence, and adulthood, in which interventions that incorporate personal assistance substantially out-perform less intensive nudges. We underscore the importance of interactive support, guidance, and motivation in facilitating significant progress and explore the challenges associated with implementing cost-effective policies to provide such assistance.
31706.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了将个人援助纳入旨在改善长期教育和劳动力市场成功的干预措施中的重要性。虽然现有研究证明了低接触行为助推的成本效益，但本文认为人力资本积累的动态性质需要长期维持的习惯。为了培养更好的习惯，社会联系对于鼓励持久的努力和内在动机至关重要。本文展示了来自人力资本积累各个阶段（包括幼儿期、青春期和成年期）的例子，在这些阶段中，包含个人援助的干预措施显著优于强度较低的助推措施。我们强调了互动支持、指导和激励在促进重大进步中的重要性，并探讨了实施具有成本效益的政策以提供此类援助所面临的挑战。

31705.title: Procurement and Infrastructure Costs
31705.authors: Zachary Liscow, Will Nober, Cailin Slattery
31705.abstract: Infrastructure costs in the United States are high and rising. The procurement process is one potential cost driver. In this paper we conduct a survey of procurement practices across the 50 states. We survey both employees at each state department of transportation (DOT) and the road builders that win contracts to build and maintain roads. With this survey we are able to create a new dataset of procurement rules and practices across the U.S. and understand what actors on the ground think drive costs. We then assemble a new dataset of project-level infrastructure costs. We correlate the survey practices with our new, detailed data on costs. We find that two important inputs in the procurement process appear to particularly drive costs: (1) the capacity of the DOT procuring the project and (2) the lack of competition in the market for government construction contracts.
31705.zh_abstract: 美国的基础设施成本高昂且不断上升。采购过程是潜在的成本驱动因素之一。在本文中，我们对全美50个州的采购实践进行了一项调查。我们调查了各州交通部门的员工以及赢得道路建设和维护合同的筑路企业。通过这项调查，我们能够创建一个关于美国各地采购规则和实践的新数据集，并了解一线参与者认为哪些因素推动了成本。然后，我们整理了一个新的项目级基础设施成本数据集。我们将调查实践与新的详细成本数据相关联。我们发现，采购过程中两个重要的投入似乎尤其推动了成本：(1) 采购项目的交通部门的能力，以及 (2) 政府建筑合同市场竞争的缺乏。
31705.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D44, H54, H57, H83, K40, L38, L91, O18, R42

31704.title: Going the Extra Mile: Farm Subsidies and Spatial Convergence in Agricultural Input Adoption
31704.zh_title: 多走一英里：农业补贴与农业投入品采纳的空间趋同
31704.authors: Naresh Kumar, Rolly Kapoor, Shilpa Aggarwal, Dahyeon Jeong, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
31704.abstract: Many countries subsidize agricultural inputs but require farmers to travel to retailers to access inputs, just as for normal purchases. What effect do travel costs have on subsidy take-up and input usage, particularly for remote farmers? We analyze Malawi's Farm Input Subsidy Program (FISP), and show that travel-cost-adjusted prices are substantially higher in remote areas. However, subsidy redemption is nearly universal. We make use of a policy change in 2017-19 which took centralized control of beneficiary selection and find that FISP eliminates the sizeable remoteness gradient that exists for non-beneficiaries. Our results demonstrate that subsidy programs may narrow spatial inequities.
31704.zh_abstract: 许多国家补贴农业投入品，但要求农民像正常购买一样前往零售商处获取投入品。旅行成本对补贴领取和投入品使用有何影响，特别是对偏远地区的农民？我们分析了马拉维的农业投入品补贴计划，并显示在偏远地区，经旅行成本调整后的价格显著更高。然而，补贴兑换几乎是普遍的。我们利用了2017-19年的一项政策变化，该变化集中控制了受益人的选择，并发现该补贴计划消除了非受益人中存在的显著偏远程度梯度。我们的结果表明，补贴计划可能会缩小空间不平等。

31703.title: Technological Rivalry and Optimal Dynamic Policy in an Open Economy
31703.zh_title: 技术竞争与开放经济中的最优动态政策
31703.authors: Yan Bai, Keyu Jin, Dan Lu
31703.abstract: What are a country’s policy options concerning the development of emerging technologies in a global economy? To address this question, we investigate optimal dynamic policies in an open economy where technology is endogenously accumulated through R&D innovation. Our key insight is that a country has incentives to influence foreign innovation efforts across sectors and over time—giving rise to optimal policies even when private innovation allocations are (Pareto) efficient. We derive explicit expressions for optimal taxes linked to both an intratemporal and an intertemporal motive to manipulate foreign technology. To affect foreign forward-looking innovation decisions, Home uses committed future trade policies (Ramsey) or innovation policies (Markov). For intratemporal price manipulation, Home government imposes higher tariffs in sectors where it has a comparative advantage.
31703.zh_abstract: 在全球经济中，一个国家关于新兴技术发展的政策选择是什么？为了解决这个问题，我们研究了开放经济中的最优动态政策，其中技术通过研发创新内生积累。我们的关键见解是，一个国家有动机影响外国在各部门和跨时期的创新努力——即使在私人创新配置是帕累托有效的情况下，也会产生最优政策。我们推导出了与操纵外国技术的期内和跨期动机相关的税收的显式表达式。为了影响外国前瞻性的创新决策，本国使用承诺的未来贸易政策或创新政策。对于期内价格操纵，本国政府在其具有比较优势的部门征收更高的关税。
31703.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E23, F12, F63, O38

31702.title: Implications of the Decline in LGBT Rights for Population Mental Health: Evidence from Polish “LGBT-free zones”
31702.zh_title: LGBT权利下降对人口心理健康的影响：来自波兰“无LGBT区”的证据
31702.authors: Chad Meyerhoefer, Bingjin Xue, Anna Poznańska
31702.abstract: We investigate the consequences of anti-LGBT laws in Poland for suicide attempts and fatalities by applying border-area difference-in-differences models to county-level data. We find that annual suicide attempts increased by 16%, or 5 attempts per 100k capita, after the enactment of anti-LGBT statutes. This rise in suicide attempts was concentrated among men, and was associated with 11 additional suicides per 100k individuals aged 30-49. We also find an increase in suicide attempts in areas that deliberated, but subsequently rejected anti-LGBT resolutions, providing evidence that stigmatization of minority groups leads to declines in population mental health.
31702.zh_abstract: 我们通过将边界地区双重差分模型应用于县级数据，调查了波兰反LGBT法律对自杀企图和死亡的影响。我们发现，在反LGBT法规颁布后，年自杀企图增加了16%，即每10万人增加5次自杀企图。自杀企图的增加主要集中在男性中，并与每10万30-49岁人群中额外增加11例自杀相关。我们还发现，在审议但随后否决了反LGBT决议的地区，自杀企图也有所增加，这提供了证据表明对少数群体的污名化会导致人口心理健康状况下降。

31748.title: Secrets in Asset Purchases: Estimating the Unofficial Incomes of Officials
31748.zh_title: 资产购买中的秘密：估算官员的非正式收入
31748.authors: Yongheng Deng, Shang-Jin Wei, Jing Wu, Rongjie Zhang
31748.abstract: The paper has been withdrawn at the request of the authors as a result of unanticipated changes in data access protocols.
31748.zh_abstract: 由于数据访问协议发生意外变化，应作者要求，本文已被撤回。

31747.title: Algorithmic Recommendations and Human Discretion
31747.zh_title: 算法推荐与人类自由裁量权
31747.authors: Victoria Angelova, Will S. Dobbie, Crystal Yang
31747.abstract: Human decision-makers frequently override the recommendations generated by predictive algorithms, but it is unclear whether these discretionary overrides add valuable private information or reintroduce human biases and mistakes. We develop new quasi-experimental tools to measure the impact of human discretion over an algorithm on the accuracy of decisions, even when the outcome of interest is only selectively observed, in the context of bail decisions. We find that 90% of the judges in our setting underperform the algorithm when they make a discretionary override, with most making override decisions that are no better than random. Yet the remaining 10% of judges outperform the algorithm in terms of both accuracy and fairness when they make a discretionary override. We provide suggestive evidence on the behavior underlying these differences in judge performance, showing that the high-performing judges are more likely to use relevant private information and are less likely to overreact to highly salient events compared to the low-performing judges.
31747.zh_abstract: 人类决策者经常推翻预测算法生成的推荐，但尚不清楚这些自由裁量的推翻行为是增加了有价值的私人信息，还是重新引入了人类偏见和错误。我们开发了新的准实验工具，用于衡量人类对算法的自由裁量权对决策准确性的影响，即使感兴趣的结果仅在保释决策背景下被选择性观测。我们发现，在我们的设定中，90%的法官在做出自由裁量的推翻决定时表现不如算法，其中大多数法官做出的推翻决定并不比随机决策更好。然而，其余10%的法官在做出自由裁量的推翻决定时，在准确性和公平性方面均优于算法。我们提供了关于法官表现差异背后行为的提示性证据，表明与表现较差的法官相比，表现优异的法官更可能使用相关的私人信息，并且不太可能对高度显著的事件做出过度反应。

31746.title: The Long-Term Effects of Income for At-Risk Infants: Evidence from Supplemental Security Income
31746.zh_title: 收入对高危婴儿的长期影响：来自补充保障收入的证据
31746.authors: Amelia A. Hawkins, Christopher A. Hollrah, Sarah Miller, Laura R. Wherry, Gloria Aldana, Mitchell D. Wong
31746.abstract: The Supplemental Security Income (SSI) program uses a birthweight cutoff at 1200 grams to determine eligibility. Using birth certificates linked to administrative records, we find low-income families of infants born just below the cutoff receive higher monthly cash benefits (equal to 27% of family income) at ages 0-2, and smaller but statistically significant positive effects on transfers through age 10. Yet, we detect no improvements in health care use and mortality in infancy, nor in health and human capital outcomes as observed through young adulthood for these infants. We also find no improvements for their older siblings.
31746.zh_abstract: 补充保障收入（SSI）计划使用1200克的出生体重临界值来确定资格。利用与行政记录关联的出生证明，我们发现，出生体重略低于临界值的低收入家庭婴儿在0-2岁时每月获得更高的现金补助（相当于家庭收入的27%），并且在10岁之前获得较小但统计上显著的转移支付正向效应。然而，我们没有检测到这些婴儿在婴儿期的医疗保健使用和死亡率方面有所改善，也没有在青年期观察到的健康和人力资本结果方面发现改善。我们也没有发现对其年长兄弟姐妹的改善。

31745.title: Bitcoin and Carbon Dioxide Emissions: Evidence from Daily Production Decisions
31745.zh_title: 比特币与二氧化碳排放：来自每日生产决策的证据
31745.authors: Anna Papp, Douglas Almond, Shuang Zhang
31745.abstract: Environmental externalities from cryptomining may be large, but have not been linked causally to mining incentives. We exploit daily variation in Bitcoin price as a natural experiment for an 86 megawatt coal-fired power plant with on-site cryptomining. We find that carbon emissions respond swiftly to mining incentives, with price elasticities of 0.69-0.71 in the short-run and 0.33-0.40 in the longer run. A $\$1$ increase in Bitcoin price leads to $\$3.11$-$\$6.79$ in external damages from carbon emissions alone, well exceeding cryptomining’s value added (using a $\$190$ social cost of carbon, but ignoring increased local air pollution). As cryptomining requires ever more computing power to mine a given number of blocks, our study highlights both the revitalization of US fossil assets and the potential value of financial industry accounting standards that incorporate cryptomining externalities.
31745.zh_abstract: 加密货币挖矿的环境外部性可能很大，但尚未与挖矿激励建立因果关系。我们利用比特币价格的每日变化作为一项自然实验，研究对象是一座拥有现场加密货币挖矿设施的86兆瓦燃煤电厂。我们发现，碳排放对挖矿激励反应迅速，短期价格弹性为0.69-0.71，长期价格弹性为0.33-0.40。比特币价格每上涨1美元，仅碳排放一项就会导致3.11至6.79美元的外部损害，这远远超过加密货币挖矿的附加值（使用190美元的社会碳成本，但忽略了当地空气污染的加剧）。由于加密货币挖矿需要越来越多的计算能力来挖掘给定数量的区块，我们的研究突显了美国化石燃料资产的复兴，以及纳入加密货币挖矿外部性的金融行业会计准则的潜在价值。

31744.title: A Perturbational Approach for Approximating Heterogeneous Agent Models
31744.zh_title: 近似异质性主体模型的扰动方法
31744.authors: Anmol Bhandari, Thomas Bourany, David Evans, Mikhail Golosov
31744.abstract: We develop a perturbational technique to approximate equilibria of a wide class of discrete-time dynamic stochastic general equilibrium heterogeneous-agent models with complex state spaces, including multi-dimensional distributions of endogenous variables. We show that approximating policy functions and stochastic process that governs the distributional state to any order is equivalent to solving small systems of linear equations that characterize values of certain directional derivatives. We analytically derive the coefficients of these linear systems and show that they satisfy simple recursive relations, making their numerical implementation quick and efficient. Compared to existing state-of-the-art techniques, our method is faster in constructing first-order approximations and extends to higher orders, capturing the effects of risk that are ignored by many current methods. We illustrate how to apply our method to a broad set of questions such as impacts of first- and second-moment shocks, welfare effect of macroeconomic risk and stabilization policies, endogenous household portfolio formation, and transition dynamics in heterogeneous agent general equilibrium settings.
31744.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种扰动技术，用于近似一类广泛的离散时间动态随机一般均衡异质性主体模型的均衡，这些模型具有复杂的状态空间，包括内生变量的多维分布。我们证明，将政策函数和支配分布状态的随机过程近似到任意阶，等价于求解表征某些方向导数值的线性方程组的小系统。我们解析推导了这些线性系统的系数，并表明它们满足简单的递归关系，从而使其数值实现快速高效。与现有的最先进技术相比，我们的方法在构建一阶近似时更快，并且可以扩展到更高阶，捕捉许多当前方法忽略的风险效应。我们说明了如何将我们的方法应用于广泛的问题，例如一阶和二阶矩冲击的影响、宏观经济风险和稳定政策的福利效应、内生家庭投资组合形成，以及异质性主体一般均衡设定中的转型动态。

31743.title: Obsolescence Rents: Teamsters, Truckers, and Impending Innovations
31743.zh_title: 过时租金：马车夫、卡车司机与即将到来的创新
31743.authors: Costas Cavounidis, Qingyuan Chai, Kevin Lang, Raghav Malhotra
31743.abstract: We consider large, permanent shocks to individual occupations whose arrival date is uncertain. We are motivated by the advent of self-driving trucks, which will dramatically reduce demand for truck drivers. Using a bare-bones overlapping generations model, we examine an occupation facing obsolescence. We show that workers must be compensated to enter the occupation - receiving what we dub obsolescence rents - with fewer and older workers remaining in the occupation. We investigate the market for teamsters at the dawn of the automotive truck as an á propos parallel to truckers themselves, as self-driving trucks crest the horizon. As widespread adoption of trucks drew nearer, the number of teamsters fell, the occupation became ‘grayer’, and teamster wages rose, as predicted by the model.
31743.zh_abstract: 我们考虑对个人职业产生巨大且永久性的冲击，其到来时间不确定。我们的动机来自自动驾驶卡车的出现，这将大幅减少对卡车司机的需求。使用一个简化的世代交叠模型，我们研究了一个面临过时的职业。我们表明，必须补偿进入该职业的工人——他们获得我们称之为过时租金的报酬——而留在该职业的工人数量更少且年龄更大。我们调查了在汽车卡车诞生之初的马车夫市场，将其作为卡车司机自身面临自动驾驶卡车即将到来时的一个恰当类比。随着卡车的广泛采用日益临近，马车夫的数量下降，该职业变得“老龄化”，并且马车夫的工资上升，正如模型所预测的那样。
31743.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：J20, J31, J62, O33

31742.title: Do Consumers Acquire Information Optimally? Experimental Evidence from Energy Efficiency
31742.zh_title: 消费者是否最优地获取信息？来自能源效率的实验证据
31742.abstract: We use an experiment to test whether consumers optimally acquire information on energy costs in appliance markets where, like many contexts, consumers are poorly informed and make mistakes despite freely-available information. We find consumers acquire information suboptimally; there is little correlation between the revealed utility gain from improved decision making due to information and willingness to pay for information. We compare two behavioral interventions to address consumer mistakes: a conventional subsidy for energy-efficient products and a non-traditional subsidy paying consumers to view information on energy costs. We show that paying for attention can target welfare improvements more effectively.
31742.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项实验来检验消费者是否在电器市场中最优地获取能源成本信息，在这些市场中，与许多情况一样，尽管信息免费可得，但消费者信息不足并会犯错。我们发现消费者获取信息并非最优；因信息而改善决策所带来的揭示效用增益与支付信息意愿之间的相关性很小。我们比较了两种解决消费者错误的行为干预措施：传统的节能产品补贴，以及一种非传统的补贴，即支付消费者查看能源成本信息。我们表明，为注意力付费可以更有效地针对福利改善。

31741.title: The Central Bank's Dilemma: Look Through Supply Shocks or Control Inflation Expectations?
31741.zh_title: 中央银行的困境：忽略供给冲击还是控制通胀预期？
31741.authors: Paul Beaudry, Thomas J. Carter, Amartya Lahiri
31741.abstract: When countries are hit by supply shocks, central banks often face the dilemma of either looking through such shocks or reacting to them to ensure that inflation expectations remain anchored. In this paper, we propose a tractable framework to capture this dilemma and explore optimal policy under a range of assumptions on how expectations are formed, including a form of bounded rationality involving level-k thinking (LKT). Despite modelling LKT in a way that nests both adaptive and rational expectations as special cases, we show that the optimal policy under LKT is qualitatively different and involves abrupt pivots in the policy stance. In particular, it is optimal for the central bank to initially look through supply shocks until a threshold is reached, then pivot discontinuously to a more hawkish anti-inflationary stance. We find that such pivots can, if optimally executed, be compatible with soft landings in the sense that most (or even all) of the reduction in inflation occurs through re-anchoring of expectations rather than economic slack. We also discuss risks and why policy errors in terms of tightening too late or too slowly can be especially costly in such an environment.
31741.zh_abstract: 当国家受到供给冲击时，中央银行常常面临两难选择：要么忽略此类冲击，要么对其做出反应以确保通胀预期保持锚定。在本文中，我们提出了一个易于处理的框架来捕捉这一困境，并在关于预期如何形成的各种假设下探索最优政策，包括一种涉及k级思维（LKT）的有限理性形式。尽管我们将LKT建模为一种将适应性预期和理性预期都作为特例包含在内的方式，但我们表明，LKT下的最优政策在性质上有所不同，涉及政策立场的突然转向。具体而言，中央银行最初忽略供给冲击直到达到某个阈值，然后不连续地转向更加鹰派的反通胀立场，这是最优的。我们发现，如果最优地执行，这种转向可以与软着陆兼容，因为通胀的降低大部分（甚至全部）是通过预期的重新锚定而非经济疲软来实现的。我们还讨论了风险，以及在这种环境下，过晚或过慢收紧的政策错误为何可能代价尤其高昂。

31740.title: Self-Employment Within the Firm
31740.authors: Vittorio Bassi, Jung Hyuk Lee, Alessandra Peter, Tommaso Porzio, Ritwika Sen, Esau Tugume
31740.abstract: We study the internal organization of manufacturing firms in Uganda. We measure what people do within firms and find limited specialization, far below what is feasible given the prevailing production process and average firm size of 5.7 workers. We build and estimate an occupational choice model in which firm size, productivity, and specialization arise endogenously. The model shows that firms in this setting are largely “self-employment in disguise” and generate just a 20% productivity gain over literal self-employment. In a counterfactual economy with full specialization, the same aggregate output can be produced with an average firm size of only 1.6.
31740.zh_abstract: 我们研究了乌干达制造业企业的内部组织。我们测量了人们在企业内从事的活动，发现专业化程度有限，远低于在现有生产流程和平均5.7名员工的企业规模下可行的水平。我们构建并估计了一个职业选择模型，在该模型中，企业规模、生产率和专业化是内生的。该模型表明，在这种环境下的企业很大程度上是“伪装的自雇”，其生产率仅比真正的自雇高出20%。在一个完全专业化的反事实经济中，同样的总产出可以用平均仅1.6名员工的企业规模来生产。
31740.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：L23, L25, O11, O14, O17

31739.title: Resilience in Vertical Supply Chains
31739.authors: Gene M. Grossman, Elhanan Helpman, Alejandro Sabal
31739.abstract: Forward-looking investments determine the resilience of firms' supply chains. Such investments confer externalities on other firms in the production network. We compare the equilibrium and optimal allocations in a general equilibrium model with an arbitrary number of vertical production tiers. Our model features endogenous investments in resilience, endogenous formation of supply links, and sequential bargaining over quantities and payments between firms in successive tiers. We derive policies that implement the first-best allocation, allowing for subsidies to input purchases, network formation, and investments in resilience. The first-best policies depend only on production function parameters of the pertinent tier. When subsidies to transactions are infeasible, the second-best subsidies for resilience and network formation depend on production function parameters throughout the network, and subsidies are larger upstream than downstream whenever the bargaining weights of buyers are non-increasing along the chain.
31739.zh_abstract: 前瞻性投资决定了企业供应链的韧性。此类投资对生产网络中的其他企业产生外部性。我们比较了一个具有任意数量垂直生产层级的一般均衡模型中的均衡配置与最优配置。我们的模型特征包括：韧性的内生投资、供应联系的内生形成，以及连续层级企业之间关于数量和支付的序贯谈判。我们推导出实现最优配置的政策，允许对投入品购买、网络形成和韧性投资进行补贴。最优政策仅取决于相关层级的生产函数参数。当对交易进行补贴不可行时，针对韧性和网络形成的次优补贴取决于整个网络的生产函数参数，并且只要买方的议价权重沿供应链非递增，上游的补贴就大于下游。

31738.title: Forest Fires: Why The Large Year-to-Year Variation in Forests Burned?
31738.zh_title: 森林火灾：为何森林过火面积存在巨大的年际变化？
31738.authors: Jerome Apt, Dennis Epple, Fallaw Sowell
31738.abstract: Quantifying factors giving rise to temporal variation in forest fires is important for advancing scientific understanding and improving fire prevention. We demonstrate that eighty percent of the large year-to-year variation in forest area burned in California can be accounted for by variation in temperature, precipitation, housing construction, electricity transmission, and ocean surface temperatures in the North Atlantic, North Pacific, and Equatorial Pacific. California is of particular interest because of its large acreage burned and proximity of fires to human populations. We believe our model is the first unified treatment of climatic factors and human activities that affect forest area burned.
31738.zh_abstract: 量化导致森林火灾时间变化的因素对于推进科学理解和改善防火工作至关重要。我们证明，加利福尼亚州森林过火面积的巨大年际变化中，有80%可以由温度、降水、住房建设、电力传输以及北大西洋、北太平洋和赤道太平洋海面温度的变化来解释。加州之所以特别值得关注，是因为其过火面积大且火灾靠近人口聚居区。我们相信，我们的模型是首个统一处理影响森林过火面积的气候因素和人类活动的模型。

31737.title: Financial Aid and Upward Mobility: Evidence from Colombia’s Ser Pilo Paga
31737.zh_title: 经济资助与向上流动性：来自哥伦比亚“Ser Pilo Paga”项目的证据
31737.authors: Juliana Londoño-Vélez, Catherine Rodriguez, Fabio Sanchez, Luis E. Álvarez-Arango
31737.abstract: We study the impact of financial aid on upward mobility. We estimate the causal impacts of a Colombian policy targeting high-achieving, low-SES students on later-life educational and labor-market outcomes. Using regression discontinuity design, difference-in-differences, and population-wide administrative microdata, we find that the policy boosted attendance and completion at high-value-added colleges, particularly in STEM fields. Improved college quality led to greater skill development. Nine years later, recipients earn 18 log points more and are more likely to reach the top 1%. The policy narrowed socioeconomic gaps in college quality, attainment, skill development, earnings, and returns to ability, improving equity and efficiency.
31737.zh_abstract: 我们研究了经济资助对向上流动性的影响。我们估计了哥伦比亚一项针对高成就、低社会经济地位学生的政策对后期教育和劳动力市场结果的因果影响。利用断点回归设计、双重差分法以及覆盖全人口的行政微观数据，我们发现该政策提高了学生在高附加值大学的入学率和毕业率，尤其是在STEM领域。大学质量的提升带来了更大的技能发展。九年后，受助者收入高出18个对数点，并且更有可能进入收入最高的前1%。该政策缩小了大学质量、学业成就、技能发展、收入以及能力回报方面的社会经济差距，从而改善了公平性和效率。
31737.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I22, I23, I24, I26

31736.title: Industrial Policy and the Great Divergence
31736.abstract: We discuss recent work evaluating the role of the government in shaping the economy during the long 19th century, a practice we refer to as industrial policy. States deployed a vast variety of different policies aimed at, primarily, but not exclusively, fostering industrialization. A thin, but growing literature has started to evaluate the economic effects of these policies, but many questions remain open for study.
31736.zh_abstract: 我们讨论了近期评估政府在漫长的19世纪中塑造经济所起作用的研究，我们将这种实践称为产业政策。各国部署了种类繁多的不同政策，主要（但并非 exclusively）旨在促进工业化。虽然已有少量但不断增长的文献开始评估这些政策的经济效应，但仍有许多问题有待研究。
31736.meta: Programs：DAE, ITI, PR；JEL：F14, N10, O14, O33

31735.title: Aspiring to a Better Future: Can a Simple Psychological Intervention Reduce Poverty?
31735.zh_title: 向往更美好的未来：一个简单的心理干预能减少贫困吗？
31735.authors: Kate Orkin, Rob Garlick, Mahreen Mahmud, Richard Sedlmayr, Johannes Haushofer, Stefan Dercon
31735.abstract: How do aspirations influence investment decisions for people living in poverty? Does this change as peoples economic conditions improve? To answer these questions, we design a workshop teaching techniques to raise aspirations and plan to achieve them. We cross-randomise this with large unconditional cash transfers in a 415-village, 8,300-person, 1.5-year experiment in Kenya. The workshop substantially raises aspirations, investment, and living standards. But the workshop+cash produces similar effects to cash alone, potentially because cash raises aspirations. Thus, helping people living in poverty set higher aspirations can raise investment and living standards, but improving economic conditions can activate the same process.
31735.zh_abstract: 对于生活在贫困中的人们，抱负如何影响他们的投资决策？随着人们经济状况的改善，这种影响会改变吗？为了回答这些问题，我们设计了一个研讨会，教授提升抱负并制定计划以实现抱负的技巧。我们在肯尼亚一个涉及415个村庄、8300人、为期1.5年的实验中，将此研讨会与大规模无条件现金转移支付进行了交叉随机化。该研讨会显著提高了抱负、投资和生活水平。但“研讨会+现金”的效果与仅提供现金的效果相似，这可能是因为现金本身也提升了抱负。因此，帮助贫困人口树立更高的抱负可以提高投资和生活水平，但改善经济条件也能激活同样的过程。

31734.title: Sexual Harassment in Public Spaces and Police Patrols: Experimental Evidence from Urban India
31734.zh_title: 公共场所性骚扰与警察巡逻：来自印度城市的实验证据
31734.authors: Sofia Amaral, Girija Borker, Nathan Fiala, Anjani Kumar, Nishith Prakash, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
31734.abstract: We conducted a randomized controlled trial to evaluate the impact of an innovative police patrol program on sexual harassment in public spaces in Hyderabad, India. In collaboration with the Hyderabad City Police, we randomized both exposure to police patrols and the visibility of officers by deploying both uniformed and undercover personnel to hotspots. We implemented a novel, high-frequency observation exercise to measure sexual harassment at 350 hotspots, where enumerators took note of all observed instances of sexual harassment and women’s responses in real time. We find that although police patrols had no impact on overall street harassment, the visible policing patrols reduced severe forms of harassment (forceful touching, intimidation) by 27 percent and reduced the likelihood of women leaving the hotspot due to sexual harassment. We uncovered the underlying mechanisms and found that both police visibility and officers’attitudes oward sexual harassment are key to understanding its incidence. While the performance of undercover officers was similar to that of uniformed officers, harassment did not decrease when undercover officers were on patrol. This suggests that the visibility of police officers is critical in deterring perpetrators. Additionally, using lab experiments we find that, on average, police officers were more tolerant of mild street harassment and less inclined to punish offenders in such cases. Correspondingly, we observed in uniformed hotspots a decline in all types of harassment only when assigned officers held stronger personal views on harassment.
31734.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项随机对照试验，以评估一项创新的警察巡逻项目对印度海得拉巴公共场所性骚扰的影响。与海得拉巴市警察局合作，我们通过部署穿制服和便衣的警员到热点区域，对警察巡逻的暴露程度和警员的可见性进行了随机化处理。我们实施了一项新颖的高频观察活动，在350个热点区域测量性骚扰情况，调查员实时记录所有观察到的性骚扰事件及女性的反应。我们发现，尽管警察巡逻对整体街头骚扰没有影响，但可见的巡逻将严重骚扰形式（强行触摸、恐吓）减少了27%，并降低了女性因性骚扰而离开热点区域的可能性。我们揭示了其背后的机制，发现警察的可见性和警官对性骚扰的态度是理解其发生率的关键。虽然便衣警员的表现与穿制服警员相似，但当便衣警员巡逻时，骚扰并未减少。这表明警察的可见性对于威慑施害者至关重要。此外，通过实验室实验，我们发现，平均而言，警察对轻微的街头骚扰更为容忍，并且不太倾向于在此类案件中惩罚违法者。相应地，我们观察到，在穿制服的警员巡逻的热点区域，只有当被指派的警官对骚扰持有更强烈的个人看法时，所有类型的骚扰才会减少。

31733.title: Effects of Universal and Unconditional Cash Transfers on Child Abuse and Neglect
31733.zh_title: 普遍无条件现金转移支付对儿童虐待和忽视的影响
31733.authors: Lindsey R. Bullinger, Analisa Packham, Kerri M. Raissian
31733.abstract: We estimate the effects of cash transfers on a severe measure of child welfare: maltreatment. To do so, we leverage year-to-year household variation from a universal and unconditional cash transfer, the Alaska Permanent Fund Dividend (PFD). Using linked individual-level administrative data on PFD payments and child maltreatment referrals, we show that an additional $\$1,000$ to families in the first few months of a child's life reduces the likelihood that a child is referred to Child Protective Services by age three by 2.0 percentage points, or 10 percent, on average. Estimates indicate that additional cash transfers also reduce child mortality.
31733.zh_abstract: 我们估计了现金转移支付对一项严重的儿童福利指标——虐待——的影响。为此，我们利用了来自一项普遍无条件现金转移支付——阿拉斯加永久基金分红（PFD）——的家庭年度间变化。通过使用关联的个人层面关于PFD支付和儿童虐待转介的行政数据，我们表明，在儿童生命最初几个月内，家庭每额外获得1000美元，该儿童在三岁前被转介至儿童保护服务机构的可能性平均降低2.0个百分点，即10%。估计还表明，额外的现金转移支付也降低了儿童死亡率。

31732.title: Investigator Racial Diversity and Clinical Trial Participation
31732.zh_title: 研究者种族多样性与临床试验参与
31732.authors: Marcella Alsan, Romaine A. Campbell, Lukas Leister, Ayotomiwa Ojo
31732.abstract: We investigate whether increased racial diversity of clinical trial principal investigators could increase the enrollment of Black patients, which currently lags population and disease-burden shares. We conducted a survey experiment in which respondents were shown a photo of a current NIH investigator in which race (Black/White) was randomized. Sex was also randomized as a relevant benchmark. Black respondents reported 0.35 standard deviation units higher interest in participating in a clinical study led by a race concordant investigator (a 12.6% increase). Sex concordance had no effect. Further analyses indicate that perceived trustworthiness and attractiveness are the most important factors explaining these results.
31732.zh_abstract: 我们研究了临床试验主要研究者的种族多样性增加是否能提高黑人患者的入组率，目前黑人患者的入组率落后于其人口和疾病负担占比。我们进行了一项调查实验，向受访者展示一位现任NIH研究者的照片，其中种族（黑人/白人）是随机分配的。性别也作为相关基准进行了随机分配。黑人受访者报告称，他们对由种族一致的研究者领导的临床研究的参与兴趣高出0.35个标准差单位（增加12.6%）。性别一致性没有影响。进一步分析表明，感知可信度和吸引力是解释这些结果的最重要因素。

31731.title: Unregulated Contaminants in Drinking Water: Evidence from PFAS and Housing Prices
31731.zh_title: 饮用水中的未受管制污染物：来自PFAS和房价的证据
31731.abstract: Our understanding of individuals’ response to information about unregulated contaminants is limited. We leverage the highly publicized social discovery of unregulated PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) contamination in public drinking water to study the impact of information about unregulated contaminants on housing prices. Using residential property transaction data, we employ a difference-in-differences research design and show that high profile media coverage about PFAS contamination significantly decreased property values of affected homes. We also find suggestive evidence of residential sorting that may have worsened environmental inequality.
31731.zh_abstract: 我们对个体如何回应关于未受管制污染物信息的理解有限。我们利用公众高度关注的公共饮用水中未受管制的PFAS（全氟和多氟烷基物质）污染的社会发现，来研究关于未受管制污染物的信息对房价的影响。使用住宅物业交易数据，我们采用双重差分研究设计，并表明关于PFAS污染的高调媒体报道显著降低了受影响房屋的房产价值。我们还发现了可能加剧环境不平等的居住分层的提示性证据。

31730.title: The Refugee Advantage: English-Language Attainment in the Early Twentieth Century
31730.zh_title: 难民优势：二十世纪初的英语水平提升
31730.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Peter Catron, Dylan Connor, Rob Voigt
31730.abstract: The United States has admitted more than 3 million refugees since 1980 through official refugee resettlement programs. Scholars attribute the success of refugee groups to governmental programs on assimilation and integration. Before 1948, however, refugees arrived without formal selection processes or federal support. We examine the integration of historical refugees using a large archive of recorded oral history interviews to understand linguistic attainment of migrants who arrived in the early twentieth century. Using fine-grained measures of vocabulary, syntax and accented speech, we find that refugee migrants achieved a greater depth of English vocabulary than did economic/family migrants, a finding that holds even when comparing migrants from the same country of origin or religious group. Our findings are consistent with the hypothesis that refugees had greater exposure to English or more incentive to learn, due to the conditions of their arrival and their inability to immediately return to their origin country.
31730.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，美国通过官方难民安置计划接收了超过300万难民。学者将难民群体的成功归因于政府在同化和融合方面的项目。然而，在1948年之前，难民是在没有正式筛选程序或联邦支持的情况下抵达的。我们利用大量存档的口述历史访谈录音来研究历史难民的融合情况，以理解二十世纪初抵达的移民的语言水平。通过使用词汇、句法和口音的精细测量，我们发现难民移民比经济/家庭移民达到了更深的英语词汇水平，即使在比较来自同一原籍国或宗教群体的移民时，这一发现仍然成立。我们的发现与以下假设一致：由于难民抵达时的条件以及他们无法立即返回原籍国，他们接触英语的机会更多或学习英语的动力更强。

31729.title: Inequality and Business Cycles
31729.authors: Florin O. Bilbiie, Giorgio Primiceri, Andrea Tambalotti
31729.abstract: We quantify the connection between inequality and business cycles in a medium-scale New Keynesian model with tractable household heterogeneity, estimated with aggregate and cross-sectional data. We find that inequality substantially amplifies cyclical fluctuations. The primary source of this amplification is cyclical precautionary saving behavior. Savers reduce their consumption to insure themselves against the idiosyncratic risk of large income drops, which rises in recessions.
31729.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有可处理家庭异质性的中等规模新凯恩斯模型中，量化了不平等与经济周期之间的联系，该模型使用总量和横截面数据进行了估计。我们发现不平等显著放大了周期性波动。这种放大的主要来源是周期性预防性储蓄行为。储蓄者减少消费以抵御收入大幅下降的异质性风险，而这种风险在经济衰退期间会上升。

31774.title: The Hidden Cost of Firearm Violence on Infants in Utero
31774.zh_title: 枪支暴力对子宫内婴儿的隐性成本
31774.authors: Janet Currie, Bahadir Dursun, Michael Hatch, Erdal Tekin
31774.abstract: Firearm violence is a critical public health crisis in the U.S., marked by a significant number of homicides involving firearms, including indiscriminate shootings in public spaces. This study investigates the largely unexplored impact of such violence on newborn health. We adopt two approaches. First, we analyze the 2002 'beltway sniper' attacks in the Washington DC metropolitan area, using administrative birth records with maternal residential addresses in Virginia. The beltway sniper attacks, a series of random shootings in the Washington DC metropolitan area, caused widespread terror and disruption over three weeks. Leveraging both spatial and temporal variation, we compare outcomes of children exposed to the attacks in utero due to timing or having a residential address near a shooting location to those who were not exposed. Second, we investigate the impact of in-utero exposure to mass shootings on infant health using restricted-access U.S. Vital Statistics Natality records between 2006 and 2019 and leveraging variation in the timing of mass shootings in counties with at least one shooting. We document substantial, previously overlooked costs on pregnant women and infants. Exposure to the beltway sniper attacks during pregnancy increased the likelihood of very low birthweight and very premature birth by 25%. The analysis of national mass shootings confirms these findings with slightly smaller effect sizes. These results emphasize the need to consider the broader impact of violence on vulnerable populations when assessing the cost of firearm violence. The estimates suggest additional costs of $\$155$ million (2023 dollars) for the beltway sniper attacks and $\$75$ million annually for mass shootings.
31774.zh_abstract: 枪支暴力是美国一个严重的公共卫生危机，其特点是涉及枪支的凶杀案数量巨大，包括在公共场所的无差别枪击。本研究调查了此类暴力对新生儿健康这一很大程度上未被探索的影响。我们采用两种方法。首先，我们分析了2002年华盛顿特区大都会区的“环城狙击手”袭击事件，使用了弗吉尼亚州包含母亲居住地址的行政出生记录。环城狙击手袭击是华盛顿特区大都会区一系列随机枪击事件，在三周内造成了广泛的恐怖和混乱。利用空间和时间变化，我们将因时间或居住地址靠近枪击地点而在子宫内暴露于袭击的儿童与未暴露的儿童的结果进行比较。其次，我们利用2006年至2019年间受限访问的美国生命统计出生记录，并利用至少发生一次枪击的县中大规模枪击事件的时间变化，研究了子宫内暴露于大规模枪击事件对婴儿健康的影响。我们记录了先前被忽视的、对孕妇和婴儿的巨大成本。怀孕期间暴露于环城狙击手袭击使极低出生体重和极早产的可能性增加了25%。对全国大规模枪击事件的分析证实了这些发现，但效应大小略小。这些结果强调，在评估枪支暴力成本时，需要考虑暴力对弱势群体的更广泛影响。估算表明，环城狙击手袭击带来了1.55亿美元（2023年美元）的额外成本，而大规模枪击事件每年带来7500万美元的额外成本。

31773.title: Labor Market Impacts of Reducing Felony Convictions
31773.zh_title: 减少重罪定罪对劳动力市场的影响
31773.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Andrew Garin, Dmitri K. Koustas, Alexandre Mas, Crystal Yang
31773.abstract: We study the labor market impacts of retroactively reducing felonies to misdemeanors in San Joaquin County, CA, where criminal justice agencies implemented Proposition 47 reductions in a quasi-random order, without requiring input or action from affected individuals. Linking records of reductions to administrative tax data, we find employment benefits for individuals who (likely) requested their reduction, consistent with selection, but no benefits among the larger subset of individuals whose records were reduced proactively. A field experiment notifying a subset of individuals about their proactive reduction also shows null results, implying that lack of awareness is unlikely to explain our findings.
31773.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在加州圣华金县将重罪追溯性减为轻罪对劳动力市场的影响，该县的刑事司法机构以准随机顺序实施了第47号提案的减刑，无需受影响个人的意见或行动。将减刑记录与行政税收数据相关联，我们发现，对于（可能）主动申请减刑的个人，存在就业收益，这与选择效应一致；但在更大范围的、被主动减刑的个人中，没有发现收益。一项针对部分被主动减刑个人的实地实验通知也显示出零结果，这意味着缺乏认知不太可能解释我们的发现。

31772.title: Contagion Effects of the Silicon Valley Bank Run
31772.zh_title: 硅谷银行挤兑的传染效应
31772.authors: Dong Beom Choi, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Tanju Yorulmazer
31772.abstract: This paper analyzes the contagion effects associated with the failure of Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) and identifies bank-specific vulnerabilities contributing to the subsequent declines in banks’ stock returns. We find that uninsured deposits, unrealized losses in held-to-maturity securities, bank size, and cash holdings had a significant impact, while better-quality assets or holdings of liquid securities did not help mitigate the negative spillovers. Interestingly, banks whose stocks performed worse post-SVB also experienced lower returns in the previous year, following Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. Stock investors appeared to anticipate risks associated with uninsured deposit reliance, but did not foresee the realization of implied losses. While mid-sized banks experienced particular stress immediately after the SVB failure, over time negative spillovers became widespread except for the largest banks.
31772.zh_abstract: 本文分析了与硅谷银行（SVB）倒闭相关的传染效应，并识别了导致随后银行股票回报下降的银行特定脆弱性。我们发现，未保险存款、持有至到期证券的未实现损失、银行规模和现金持有量具有显著影响，而更优质的资产或流动性证券的持有并未有助于缓解负面溢出效应。有趣的是，在SVB倒闭后股票表现较差的银行，在之前一年美联储加息后也经历了较低的回报。股票投资者似乎预见到了与未保险存款依赖相关的风险，但未能预见到隐含损失的实现。虽然中型银行在SVB倒闭后立即经历了特别压力，但随着时间的推移，除最大银行外，负面溢出效应变得普遍。

31771.title: When Product Markets Become Collective Traps: The Case of Social Media
31771.zh_title: 当产品市场成为集体陷阱：以社交媒体为例
31771.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Benjamin R. Handel, Rafael Jimenez, Christopher Roth
31771.abstract: Individuals might experience negative utility from not consuming a popular product. With such externalities to non-users, standard consumer surplus measures, which take aggregate consumption as given, fail to appropriately capture consumer welfare. We propose an approach to account for these externalities and apply it to estimate consumer welfare from two social media platforms: TikTok and Instagram. Incentivized experiments with college students indicate positive welfare based on the standard measure, but negative welfare when accounting for these non-user externalities. Our findings highlight the existence of product market traps, where large shares of active users prefer each platform not to exist.
31771.zh_abstract: 个人可能会因不消费一种流行产品而经历负效用。在这种对非用户的负外部性下，将总消费视为给定的标准消费者剩余衡量指标无法恰当捕捉消费者福利。我们提出了一种考虑这些外部性的方法，并将其应用于估算来自两个社交媒体平台（TikTok和Instagram）的消费者福利。对大学生进行的激励实验表明，基于标准衡量指标，福利为正；但在考虑这些非用户外部性时，福利为负。我们的发现凸显了产品市场陷阱的存在，即大量活跃用户更希望每个平台不存在。

31770.title: The Labor Demand and Labor Supply Channels of Monetary Policy
31770.zh_title: 货币政策的劳动力需求与劳动力供给渠道
31770.authors: Sebastian Graves, Christopher K. Huckfeldt, Eric T. Swanson
31770.abstract: Monetary policy is conventionally understood to influence labor demand, with little effect on labor supply. We estimate the response of labor market flows to high-frequency changes in interest rates around FOMC announcements and Fed Chair speeches and find evidence that, in contrast to the consensus view, a contractionary monetary policy shock leads to a significant increase in labor supply: workers reduce the rate at which they quit jobs to nonemployment, and non-employed individuals increase their job-seeking behavior. These effects are quantitatively important: holding supply-driven labor market flows constant, the decline in employment from a contractionary monetary policy shock would be twice as large. To interpret our findings, we estimate a heterogeneous agent model with frictional labor markets and an active labor supply margin. The model rationalizes existing estimates of small labor supply responses to idiosyncratic transfers with our new evidence of a large labor supply response to an aggregate shock.
31770.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为货币政策影响劳动力需求，而对劳动力供给影响甚微。我们估算了在联邦公开市场委员会公告和美联储主席演讲前后，劳动力市场流动对利率高频变化的反应，并发现证据表明，与共识相反，紧缩性货币政策冲击会导致劳动力供给显著增加：工人减少离职至非就业状态的比率，非就业个体增加求职行为。这些效应在数量上很重要：在保持供给驱动的劳动力市场流动不变的情况下，紧缩性货币政策冲击导致的就业下降幅度将是原来的两倍。为解释我们的发现，我们估计了一个包含摩擦性劳动力市场和活跃劳动力供给边际的异质性主体模型。该模型将现有关于劳动力供给对个体转移支付反应较小的估计，与我们关于劳动力供给对总体冲击反应较大的新证据进行了合理化解释。
31770.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E32, E52, J22, J23, J64

31769.title: The Environmental Cost of Easy Credit: The Housing Channel
31769.zh_title: 宽松信贷的环境成本：住房渠道
31769.abstract: Heating, cooling, and powering the residential housing stock accounts for about one-fifth of total annual greenhouse gas emissions in the US. Home size is a key determinant of energy intensity. The average newly built single-family home is 50% larger than in the 1950s. Using distinct identification strategies spanning the last four decades of banking history, we show that more abundant credit increases average new home size. It also facilitates more construction but does not produce offsetting increases in home quality or durability. These results highlight potential environmental costs associated with monetary policies that expand access to credit.
31769.zh_abstract: 住宅供暖、制冷和供电约占美国年度温室气体排放总量的五分之一。房屋面积是能源强度的关键决定因素。新建独栋住宅的平均面积比20世纪50年代大50%。利用跨越过去四十年银行业历史的不同识别策略，我们表明更充裕的信贷会增加新建住宅的平均面积。它还促进了更多的建设，但并未带来房屋质量或耐久性的补偿性提升。这些结果凸显了与扩大信贷获取渠道的货币政策相关的潜在环境成本。

31768.title: Institutions, Comparative Advantage, and the Environment
31768.abstract: This paper proposes that strong financial, judicial, and labor market institutions provide comparative advantage in clean industries, and thereby improve a country's environmental quality. Five complementary tests support this hypothesis. First, industries that depend on institutions are disproportionately clean. Second, strong institutions increase relative exports in clean industries, even conditional on environmental regulation and factor endowments. Third, an industry's complexity helps explain the link between institutions and clean goods. Fourth, a quantitative general equilibrium model indicates that strengthening a country's institutions decreases its pollution through relocating dirty industries abroad, though increases pollution in other countries. Fifth, cross-country differences in the composition of output between clean and dirty industries explain more of the global distribution of emissions than differences in the techniques used for production do. The comparative advantage that strong institutions provide in clean industries gives one under-explored reason why developing countries have relatively high pollution levels.
31768.zh_abstract: 本文提出，强大的金融、司法和劳动力市场制度为清洁行业提供了比较优势，从而改善了一国的环境质量。五项互补性检验支持了这一假说。第一，依赖制度的行业不成比例地属于清洁行业。第二，强大的制度增加了清洁行业的相对出口，即使在控制了环境规制和要素禀赋之后也是如此。第三，行业的复杂性有助于解释制度与清洁产品之间的联系。第四，一个定量的一般均衡模型表明，加强一国制度会通过将污染行业转移到国外来减少其污染，但会增加其他国家的污染。第五，各国清洁与污染行业产出构成的差异，比生产所用技术的差异更能解释全球排放分布。强大制度在清洁行业提供的比较优势，是解释发展中国家污染水平相对较高的一个未被充分探讨的原因。
31768.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：F18, F55, F6, F64, H23, O4, O44, P48, Q50, Q56

31767.title: The Turing Transformation: Artificial Intelligence, Intelligence Augmentation, and Skill Premiums
31767.zh_title: 图灵转型：人工智能、智能增强与技能溢价
31767.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
31767.abstract: We ask whether a technical objective of using human performance of tasks as a benchmark for AI performance will result in the negative outcomes highlighted in prior work in terms of jobs and inequality. Instead, we argue that task automation, especially when driven by AI advances, can enhance job prospects and potentially widen the scope for employment of many workers. The neglected mechanism we highlight is the potential for changes in the skill premium where AI automation of tasks exogenously improves the value of the skills of many workers, expands the pool of available workers to perform other tasks, and, in the process, increases labor income and potentially reduces inequality. We label this possibility the “Turing Transformation.” As such, we argue that AI researchers and policymakers should not focus on the technical aspects of AI applications and whether they are directed at automating human-performed tasks or not and, instead, focus on the outcomes of AI research. In so doing, our goal is not to diminish human-centric AI research as a laudable goal. Instead, we want to note that AI research that uses a human-task template with a goal to automate that task can often augment human performance of other tasks and whole jobs. The distributional effects of technology depend more on which workers have tasks that get automated than on the fact of automation per se.
31767.zh_abstract: 我们探究以人类任务表现作为人工智能性能基准的技术目标，是否会导致先前研究中强调的关于就业和不平等的负面结果。相反，我们认为任务自动化，尤其是由人工智能进步驱动的自动化，可以改善就业前景，并可能扩大许多工人的就业范围。我们强调的被忽视的机制是技能溢价变化的潜力：人工智能对任务的自动化外生地提升了许多工人技能的价值，扩大了可用于执行其他任务的工人池，并在此过程中增加了劳动收入，可能减少不平等。我们将这种可能性称为“图灵转型”。因此，我们认为人工智能研究人员和政策制定者不应关注人工智能应用的技术方面以及它们是否旨在自动化人类执行的任务，而应关注人工智能研究的结果。这样做，我们的目标不是贬低以人为中心的人工智能研究这一值得称赞的目标。相反，我们想指出，使用人类任务模板并以自动化该任务为目标的人工智能研究，通常可以增强人类执行其他任务和整体工作的能力。技术的分配效应更多地取决于哪些工人的任务被自动化，而不是自动化本身这一事实。

31761.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Inequality: Maternal Endowments, Investments, and Birth Outcomes
31761.zh_title: 不平等的代际传递：母亲禀赋、投资与出生结局
31761.abstract: Newborn health is an important component in the chain of intergenerational transmission of disadvantage.
